message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-u7ry8 (second_order_centrality empty/disconnected)

Fixed in commit e12d307. second_order_centrality now raises
NetworkXException with nx's exact wording on empty and disconnected
graphs, hoisting the guards above the Rust fast path so both
branches enforce the same contract.

Sweep: 6656 passed, 0 failed (+8 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
